_comment: Generated by scripts/gen_matrix.py. Payload sweep over [64, 256, 1024, 4096, 16384] bytes (monocoque's throughput-bench size set) across all five kinds per target. Count-based kinds shrink their message count as the payload grows so cells stay within budget; duration-based kinds run a 3.0s window. 270 cells. On one vCPU the producer and consumer share the core, so these numbers validate mechanics and the payload trend, not absolute engine performance. Regenerate with: python3 scripts/gen_matrix.py
